boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: support transcript release before PII redaction completion.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record closes scope and recipient match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defect remains; warning tone is not controlling.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current control record.

final_answer: The exact current source control record closes the requested action boundary: scope, actor, effective date, and system boundary match. The warning in communication text is contextual only and does not override the controlling record. Proceed is allowed on source evidence alone, with no remaining gate defect.
